title: 1985 Denver Mini Classic,  Boys 10 11, Criterium Awards Ceremony

enrichment.summary: An announcer reads the results of the Boys 10-11 Criterium at the 1985 Denver Mini Classic awards ceremony. Kyle Pounds (number 38) is called out in sixth place, and subsequent places through second are announced with ribbons and gift certificates from sponsors including McDonald's and BNH Sports.
enrichment.speaker: other
